slides.title: The amino acid behind *healthier aging*?
slides.sub: Taurine levels fall as we age — and recent research links restoring it to healthier aging in animals. The human picture is still early.

slides.title: Taurine drops with age
slides.body: Blood taurine *falls sharply with age* — and a major 2023 study tied that decline to faster aging in animals.

slides.title: Restoring it helped — in mice
slides.body: Supplementing taurine *extended healthy lifespan in mice* and improved markers of aging. Promising, not proven in humans.

slides.title: Humans aren't mice
slides.body: Human trials are still early — taurine is *promising, not a fountain* of youth. Treat the hype with caution.

slides.title: It's already in food
slides.body: You don't need a lab — taurine is *rich in meat, fish, shellfish*. Protein-heavy eaters get plenty already.

slides.title: Eat well, watch the science
slides.body: Cover your protein and the basics first — then *let the research catch up* before betting on a pill.

slides.title: Bet on *habits, not hype*.
slides.body: Vibe Health scores your food, sleep, steps, and water into one daily Health Score — the proven basics that actually support healthy aging.

caption:
Taurine — the amino acid the longevity world won't stop talking about. 🧬

Levels fall as we age, and a 2023 study tied restoring it to healthier aging — in mice. Human evidence is still early, and it's already rich in meat, fish, and shellfish. Save this. 🔖

Vibe Health scores the proven basics — food, sleep, steps, water — into one daily number → link in bio.
youtube_title: Taurine and Aging: What the Science Actually Shows
